fillInTheBlank.sentence: Let's walk BLANK the steps together. First, download the BLANK from the official website. It'll guide you through the BLANK process. If you have any issues during the BLANK, don't hesitate to reach out.

blanks.feedback: Ova reč se koristi za opisivanje napretka unutar procesa ili faze.
Ovo se tiče programa koji instaliraju druge programe.
U ovom kontekstu, koristi se kao imenica za označavanje procesa organizacije ili pripreme.
Ovaj termin se odnosi na proces instalacije, posebno programa.

dialogue.text: Let's walk through the steps together.
First, download the installer from the official website.
It'll guide you through the setup process.
If you have any issues during the installation, don't hesitate to reach out.

description:
installer je program koji se koristi za instaliranje drugog softvera. Na primer, Download the installer to get the app on your computer.

Setup kao imenica odnosi se na aranžman ili pripremu nečega. Na primer, Check the setup instructions for your new phone. Set up kao glagol znači organizovati ili pripremiti, kao Please set up the chairs for the meeting.

Installation odnosi se na proces instaliranja nečega, posebno softvera ili hardvera. Na primer, Follow the steps for the software installation.
